# kIOInterruptTypePCIMessagedX

**Enumeration Case**

An extended message signal interrupt (MSI-X) type for a PCI device.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOInterruptTypePCIMessagedX
```

## Types

- **kIOInterruptTypePCIMessaged**: A message signaled interrupt (MSI) type for a PCI device.
